title: Form layer loses all position information for error messages
description: SCENARIO: All ParseErrors from the form layer have line: None and col: None (documented as intentional). When a script has a structural error caught at the form layer — e.g. unclosed bracket, unexpected comma — the error message contains no source location. For any script longer than a few lines, this makes errors hard to diagnose. The evaluator layer (which reports errors as SieveError with no position either) compounds this. MAINTENANCE CONSEQUENCE: every bug report from users will require manual bisection to find the offending line. Fix: at minimum, thread token indices through the form layer and map them back to the original line/col from the token stream. Tokens do not currently carry position; adding position to Token is a prerequisite.
